description: Letter probably sent from Palestine to Egypt. In Judaeo-Arabic and Hebrew. Dating: ca. 13th–15th century (paleographic dating). There are two folios, which probably originally joined, but it's not clear precisely how. On the first page, the writer reports that "not only them, but the Alexandrians (ahl al-thaghr) who remained in Hebron "all fell sick with this fever" It is difficult to make out the subject of the remainder of the letter. Needs further examination.
tags: epidemic: fever, Late JA, illness: fever, Hebron, epidemic, Illness
description_he: מכתב ששוגר ככל הנראה מפלשתינה למצרים. בערבית-יהודית ועברית. תיארוך: כ-המאות ה-13 עד ה-15. הכותב מדווח כי 'לא רק הם, אלא האלכסנדרונים שנשארו בחברון כולם חלו בקדחת זו'.
